T0173.title: Fast Track Query
T0173.definition: In illegal data trading, a method used by upstream sources to obtain data, characterized by fast query speeds (results within minutes), with sources possibly being public authority systems or high-efficiency channels.
T0173.description: In illegal data trading, a method used by upstream sources to obtain data, characterized by fast query speeds (results within minutes), with sources possibly being public authority systems or high-efficiency channels.
T0173.usageExample: "Bank transaction records for any bank, stable, fast line—departing Sunday night, returns Tuesday or Wednesday."
